timer.title: Problem Time
timer.explainer: Problem Time is a Management 3.0 practice for structured problem discussion. Set a timer, state the problem clearly, discuss without blame, and focus on actionable solutions.

guide.title: Facilitation Guide
steps: State the problem in one sentence — no blame, no solutions yet
Who is affected? What is the impact?
What small experiment can we run this week?
Who owns the next step and by when?

dialogue.title: Improvement Dialogue
dialogue.explainer: An Improvement Dialogue is a structured 1:1 or group conversation to deeply understand a problem and co-create solutions. Use the guiding questions to facilitate.
dialogue.noItems: Add improvement items on the Board first.
questions: What is the root cause of this problem?
What does success look like after improvement?
What barriers are in the way?
What resources or support are needed?
What is the smallest step we can take today?
dialogue.noNotes: No notes yet for this item.

team.title: Team & Copilots
team.explainer: Copilots are peer coaches assigned to improvement items. They support the owner without taking over — asking questions, checking in, and celebrating progress.
team.noCopilotAssignments: No active items with copilots assigned.
